stemHtml: The time of useful consciousness in case of a decompression at an altitude of 40 000 ft is…

options.a: Slow decompression 11-14 seconds and rapid decompression 7-10 seconds.
options.b: Slow decompression 25-30 seconds and rapid decompression 7-10 seconds.
options.c: Slow decompression 20-30 seconds and rapid decompression 6-9 seconds.
options.d: Slow decompression 15-20 seconds and rapid decompression 7-10 seconds.
